name: plugin-builder
description: Create local Codex plugins with the bundled Plugin Creator skill, then review and share the result from a polished right-side app.

interface.shortDescription: Create, review, and share newly built local plugins
interface.longDescription: Use the bundled Plugin Creator skill to scaffold a local plugin, then open a read-only Codex app that inspects the plugin's real local contents and continues into View or Share in the desktop app.
